meta-description: Learn about the Medicare Hospital Insurance Tax by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Medicare hospital insurance tax
excerpt: A tax under the Federal Insurance Contributions Act (FICA) that is a United States payroll tax imposed by the federal government on both employees and employers to fund Medicare.
content: A tax under the Federal Insurance Contributions Act (FICA) that is a United States payroll tax imposed by the federal government on both employees and employers to fund Medicare.
